From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia.
Import ListNotations.

(** * PCF + References: Type Preservation — Benchmark *)

Inductive ty : Type :=
  | TyNat | TyBool | TyArrow : ty -> ty -> ty | TyRef : ty -> ty.

Inductive tm : Type :=
  | Var : nat -> tm | Num : nat -> tm | BOOL : bool -> tm
  | Succ : tm -> tm | Pred : tm -> tm | IsZero : tm -> tm
  | If : tm -> tm -> tm -> tm
  | Lam : ty -> tm -> tm | App : tm -> tm -> tm | Fix : tm -> tm
  | Ref : tm -> tm | Deref : tm -> tm | Assign : tm -> tm -> tm | Loc : nat -> tm.

Definition ctx := list ty.
Definition store_ty := list ty.

Inductive has_type : ctx -> store_ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Var : forall G S x T, nth_error G x = Some T -> has_type G S (Var x) T
  | T_Num : forall G S n, has_type G S (Num n) TyNat
  | T_Bool : forall G S b, has_type G S (BOOL b) TyBool
  | T_Succ : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Succ t) TyNat
  | T_Pred : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Pred t) TyNat
  | T_IsZero : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (IsZero t) TyBool
  | T_If : forall G S t1 t2 t3 T, has_type G S t1 TyBool -> has_type G S t2 T -> has_type G S t3 T -> has_type G S (If t1 t2 t3) T
  | T_Lam : forall G S T1 T2 t, has_type (T1 :: G) S t T2 -> has_type G S (Lam T1 t) (TyArrow T1 T2)
  | T_App : forall G S t1 t2 T1 T2, has_type G S t1 (TyArrow T1 T2) -> has_type G S t2 T1 -> has_type G S (App t1 t2) T2
  | T_Fix : forall G S t T, has_type (T :: G) S t T -> has_type G S (Fix t) T
  | T_Ref : forall G S t T, has_type G S t T -> has_type G S (Ref t) (TyRef T)
  | T_Deref : forall G S t T, has_type G S t (TyRef T) -> has_type G S (Deref t) T
  | T_Assign : forall G S t1 t2 T, has_type G S t1 (TyRef T) -> has_type G S t2 T -> has_type G S (Assign t1 t2) TyNat
  | T_Loc : forall G S l T, nth_error S l = Some T -> has_type G S (Loc l) (TyRef T).

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
  | V_Num : forall n, value (Num n)
  | V_Bool : forall b, value (BOOL b)
  | V_Lam : forall T t, value (Lam T t)
  | V_Loc : forall l, value (Loc l).

Fixpoint shift_at (d : nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | Var x => if x <? d then Var x else Var (x + 1)
  | Num n => Num n | BOOL b => BOOL b
  | Succ t1 => Succ (shift_at d t1) | Pred t1 => Pred (shift_at d t1)
  | IsZero t1 => IsZero (shift_at d t1)
  | If t1 t2 t3 => If (shift_at d t1) (shift_at d t2) (shift_at d t3)
  | Lam T t1 => Lam T (shift_at (S d) t1)
  | App t1 t2 => App (shift_at d t1) (shift_at d t2)
  | Fix t1 => Fix (shift_at (S d) t1)
  | Ref t1 => Ref (shift_at d t1) | Deref t1 => Deref (shift_at d t1)
  | Assign t1 t2 => Assign (shift_at d t1) (shift_at d t2)
  | Loc l => Loc l
  end.

Definition shift (t : tm) : tm := shift_at 0 t.

Fixpoint subst (j : nat) (s t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | Var x => if Nat.eqb x j then s else Var x
  | Num n => Num n | BOOL b => BOOL b
  | Succ t1 => Succ (subst j s t1) | Pred t1 => Pred (subst j s t1)
  | IsZero t1 => IsZero (subst j s t1)
  | If t1 t2 t3 => If (subst j s t1) (subst j s t2) (subst j s t3)
  | Lam T t1 => Lam T (subst (S j) (shift s) t1)
  | App t1 t2 => App (subst j s t1) (subst j s t2)
  | Fix t1 => Fix (subst (S j) (shift s) t1)
  | Ref t1 => Ref (subst j s t1) | Deref t1 => Deref (subst j s t1)
  | Assign t1 t2 => Assign (subst j s t1) (subst j s t2)
  | Loc l => Loc l
  end.

Definition heap := list (nat * tm).

Fixpoint heap_lookup (l : nat) (mu : heap) : option tm :=
  match mu with
  | [] => None
  | (l', v) :: mu' => if Nat.eqb l l' then Some v else heap_lookup l mu'
  end.

Fixpoint heap_update (l : nat) (v : tm) (mu : heap) : heap :=
  match mu with
  | [] => []
  | (l', v') :: mu' => if Nat.eqb l l' then (l, v) :: mu'
                        else (l', v') :: heap_update l v mu'
  end.

Inductive heap_ok : heap -> store_ty -> Prop :=
  | heap_empty : forall S, heap_ok [] S
  | heap_cons : forall l v mu S T, heap_ok mu S -> has_type [] S v T -> nth_error S l = Some T -> heap_ok ((l, v) :: mu) S.

Inductive step : tm -> heap -> tm -> heap -> Prop :=
  | S_Succ : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (Succ t) mu (Succ t') mu'
  | S_PredZero : forall mu, step (Pred (Num 0)) mu (Num 0) mu
  | S_PredSucc : forall n mu, step (Pred (Num (S n))) mu (Num n) mu
  | S_Pred : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (Pred t) mu (Pred t') mu'
  | S_IsZeroZero : forall mu, step (IsZero (Num 0)) mu (BOOL true) mu
  | S_IsZeroSucc : forall n mu, step (IsZero (Num (S n))) mu (BOOL false) mu
  | S_IsZero : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (IsZero t) mu (IsZero t') mu'
  | S_IfTrue : forall t1 t2 mu, step (If (BOOL true) t1 t2) mu t1 mu
  | S_IfFalse : forall t1 t2 mu, step (If (BOOL false) t1 t2) mu t2 mu
  | S_If : forall t1 mu t1' mu' t2 t3, step t1 mu t1' mu' -> step (If t1 t2 t3) mu (If t1' t2 t3) mu'
  | S_App1 : forall t1 mu t1' mu' t2, step t1 mu t1' mu' -> step (App t1 t2) mu (App t1' t2) mu'
  | S_App2 : forall v1 t2 mu t2' mu', value v1 -> step t2 mu t2' mu' -> step (App v1 t2) mu (App v1 t2') mu'
  | S_AppAbs : forall T t1 v2 mu, value v2 -> step (App (Lam T t1) v2) mu (subst 0 v2 t1) mu
  | S_Fix : forall t mu, step (Fix t) mu (subst 0 (Fix t) t) mu
  | S_Ref : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (Ref t) mu (Ref t') mu'
  | S_RefV : forall v mu, value v -> step (Ref v) mu (Loc (length mu)) ((length mu, v) :: mu)
  | S_Deref : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (Deref t) mu (Deref t') mu'
  | S_DerefLoc : forall l mu v, heap_lookup l mu = Some v -> step (Deref (Loc l)) mu v mu
  | S_Assign1 : forall t1 mu t1' mu' t2, step t1 mu t1' mu' -> step (Assign t1 t2) mu (Assign t1' t2) mu'
  | S_Assign2 : forall l t2 mu t2' mu', step t2 mu t2' mu' -> step (Assign (Loc l) t2) mu (Assign (Loc l) t2') mu'
  | S_AssignV : forall l v mu, value v -> step (Assign (Loc l) v) mu (Num 0) (heap_update l v mu).

Definition extends (S' S : store_ty) : Prop := exists S2, S' = S ++ S2.

(** Helper lemmas *)

Lemma nth_error_Some_length : forall (A : Type) (l : list A) n x,
  nth_error l n = Some x -> n < length l.
Proof.
  intros A l n x H. apply nth_error_Some. rewrite H. discriminate.
Qed.

Lemma extends_refl : forall S, extends S S.
Proof.
  intros S. unfold extends. exists []. rewrite app_nil_r. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma has_type_store_weaken : forall G S t T S',
  has_type G S t T ->
  extends S' S ->
  has_type G S' t T.
Proof.
  intros G S t T S' Ht Hext. revert S' Hext. induction Ht; intros S' Hext.
  - apply T_Var. assumption.
  - apply T_Num.
  - apply T_Bool.
  - apply T_Succ. apply IHHt. assumption.
  - apply T_Pred. apply IHHt. assumption.
  - apply T_IsZero. apply IHHt. assumption.
  - apply T_If; [apply IHHt1 | apply IHHt2 | apply IHHt3]; assumption.
  - apply T_Lam. apply IHHt. assumption.
  - eapply T_App; [eapply IHHt1 | eapply IHHt2]; assumption.
  - apply T_Fix. apply IHHt. assumption.
  - apply T_Ref. apply IHHt. assumption.
  - apply T_Deref. apply IHHt. assumption.
  - eapply T_Assign; [eapply IHHt1 | eapply IHHt2]; assumption.
  - destruct Hext as [S2 HS']. rewrite HS'.
    apply T_Loc. rewrite (nth_error_app1 S S2). assumption.
    eapply nth_error_Some_length; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma has_type_shift_proper : forall t,
  (forall G S T T', has_type G S t T -> has_type (T' :: G) S (shift_at 0 t) T).
Proof.
  induction t; intros G S T T' Ht; inversion Ht; subst; simpl; auto;
  try (econstructor; eauto; fail);
  try (eapply T_Lam; eapply IHt; eauto; fail);
  try (eapply T_Fix; eapply IHt; eauto; fail).
  destruct (n ?= 0)%nat eqn:Heq; simpl; auto.
  - apply Nat.ltb_lt in Heq. lia.
  - apply Nat.ltb_ge in Heq.
    apply T_Var. rewrite nth_error_cons. destruct n; simpl; auto.
    inversion H2; reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma has_type_subst : forall t,
  (forall G S s T U, has_type G S s U -> has_type (U :: G) S t T -> has_type G S (subst 0 s t) T).
Proof.
  induction t; intros G S s0 T U Hs Ht; inversion Ht; subst; simpl; auto;
  try (econstructor; eauto; fail).
  - destruct (Nat.eqb n 0) eqn:Heq.
    + apply Nat.eqb_eq in Heq. subst n. simpl in H3. inversion H3; subst. assumption.
    + apply T_Var. apply Nat.eqb_neq in Heq. destruct n; simpl in *.
      * exfalso; apply Heq; reflexivity.
      * inversion H3; reflexivity.
  - eapply T_Lam. eapply IHt; eauto. eapply has_type_shift_proper; eauto.
  - eapply T_Fix. eapply IHt; eauto. eapply has_type_shift_proper; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma heap_ok_lookup : forall mu S l v,
  heap_ok mu S ->
  heap_lookup l mu = Some v ->
  exists T, nth_error S l = Some T /\ has_type [] S v T.
Proof.
  induction mu; intros S l v Hok Hlk; simpl in *.
  - discriminate.
  - destruct a as [l' v']; inversion Hok; subst.
    destruct (Nat.eqb l l') eqn:Heq.
    + apply Nat.eqb_eq in Heq; subst l'. inversion Hlk; subst v'.
      exists T; auto.
    + apply IHmu; auto.
Qed.

Lemma heap_ok_update : forall mu S l v T,
  heap_ok mu S ->
  nth_error S l = Some T ->
  has_type [] S v T ->
  heap_ok (heap_update l v mu) S.
Proof.
  induction mu; intros S l v T Hok Hnth Hty.
  - apply heap_empty.
  - destruct a as [l' v']; inversion Hok; subst; simpl.
    destruct (Nat.eqb l l') eqn:Heq.
    + apply Nat.eqb_eq in Heq; subst l'.
      eapply heap_cons; eauto.
    + eapply heap_cons; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma heap_ok_extends : forall mu S S',
  heap_ok mu S ->
  extends S' S ->
  heap_ok mu S'.
Proof.
  induction mu; intros S S' Hok Hext.
  - apply heap_empty.
  - destruct a as [l v]; inversion Hok; subst.
    eapply heap_cons.
    + apply IHmu with (S := S); auto.
    + eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto.
    + unfold extends in Hext. destruct Hext as [S2 HS']. rewrite HS'.
      apply nth_error_app1. eapply nth_error_Some_length; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma length_heap_ok_le : forall mu S,
  heap_ok mu S ->
  length mu <= length S.
Proof.
  induction mu; intros S Hok.
  - lia.
  - destruct a as [l v]; inversion Hok; subst; simpl.
    apply IHmu in H3.
    assert (l < length S) by (eapply nth_error_Some_length; eauto).
    lia.
Qed.

(** ** Conjecture pairs
    For each conjecture, both the statement and its negation are given.
    Prove exactly one of each pair. *)

Theorem preservation :
  forall t mu t' mu' T S,
    has_type [] S t T ->
    step t mu t' mu' ->
    heap_ok mu S ->
    length mu >= length S ->
    exists S',
      extends S' S /\
      heap_ok mu' S' /\
      has_type [] S' t' T.
Proof.
  induction 2; intros T S Hty Hok Hlen.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H5; eauto.
    destruct H5 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    inversion H5. apply T_Num.
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    inversion H5. apply T_Num.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H5; eauto.
    destruct H5 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    apply T_Bool.
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    apply T_Bool.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H5; eauto.
    destruct H5 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H6; eauto.
    destruct H6 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H4; eauto.
    destruct H4 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    eapply T_App; eauto. apply has_type_store_weaken with (S := S); auto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H7; eauto.
    destruct H7 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    eapply T_App; eauto. eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    inversion H6; subst.
    eapply has_type_subst; [apply H10 | assumption].
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    eapply has_type_subst; [apply H7 | apply H4].
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H5; eauto.
    destruct H5 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. inversion H5; subst.
    apply length_heap_ok_le in Hok. assert (Hlen_eq : length mu = length S) by lia.
    exists (S ++ [T]).
    split.
    { unfold extends. exists [T]. reflexivity. }
    split.
    { simpl. eapply heap_cons.
      - eapply heap_ok_extends; eauto.
      - eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto. unfold extends. exists [T]. reflexivity.
      - rewrite Hlen_eq. rewrite nth_error_app_right. simpl. reflexivity. }
    { eapply T_Loc.
      rewrite Hlen_eq. rewrite nth_error_app_right. simpl. reflexivity. }
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H5; eauto.
    destruct H5 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    eapply heap_ok_lookup in Hok; eauto.
    destruct Hok as [T0 [Hnth Htyv]].
    exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    inversion H6; subst. assumption.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H6; eauto.
    destruct H6 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    eapply T_Assign; eauto. eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H9; eauto.
    destruct H9 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    eapply T_Assign; eauto. eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. inversion H8; subst.
    eapply heap_ok_lookup in Hok as [T0 [Hnth Hokv]]; eauto.
    exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    + apply heap_ok_update with (T := T0); auto.
    + apply T_Num.
Qed.

Theorem preservation_neg : ~ (
  forall t mu t' mu' T S,
    has_type [] S t T ->
    step t mu t' mu' ->
    heap_ok mu S ->
    length mu >= length S ->
    exists S',
      extends S' S /\
      heap_ok mu' S' /\
      has_type [] S' t' T).
Proof.
Admitted.

input.content:
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia.
Import ListNotations.

Inductive ty : Type := TyNat | TyBool | TyArrow : ty -> ty -> ty | TyRef : ty -> ty.

Inductive tm : Type :=
  Var : nat -> tm | Num : nat -> tm | BOOL : bool -> tm
  | Succ : tm -> tm | Pred : tm -> tm | IsZero : tm -> tm
  | If : tm -> tm -> tm -> tm
  | Lam : ty -> tm -> tm | App : tm -> tm -> tm | Fix : tm -> tm
  | Ref : tm -> tm | Deref : tm -> tm | Assign : tm -> tm -> tm | Loc : nat -> tm.

Definition ctx := list ty.
Definition store_ty := list ty.

Inductive has_type : ctx -> store_ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Var : forall G S x T, nth_error G x = Some T -> has_type G S (Var x) T
  | T_Num : forall G S n, has_type G S (Num n) TyNat
  | T_Bool : forall G S b, has_type G S (BOOL b) TyBool
  | T_Succ : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Succ t) TyNat
  | T_Pred : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Pred t) TyNat
  | T_IsZero : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (IsZero t) TyBool
  | T_If : forall G S t1 t2 t3 T, has_type G S t1 TyBool -> has_type G S t2 T -> has_type G S t3 T -> has_type G S (If t1 t2 t3) T
  | T_Lam : forall G S T1 T2 t, has_type (T1 :: G) S t T2 -> has_type G S (Lam T1 t) (TyArrow T1 T2)
  | T_App : forall G S t1 t2 T1 T2, has_type G S t1 (TyArrow T1 T2) -> has_type G S t2 T1 -> has_type G S (App t1 t2) T2
  | T_Fix : forall G S t T, has_type (T :: G) S t T -> has_type G S (Fix t) T
  | T_Ref : forall G S t T, has_type G S t T -> has_type G S (Ref t) (TyRef T)
  | T_Deref : forall G S t T, has_type G S t (TyRef T) -> has_type G S (Deref t) T
  | T_Assign : forall G S t1 t2 T, has_type G S t1 (TyRef T) -> has_type G S t2 T -> has_type G S (Assign t1 t2) TyNat
  | T_Loc : forall G S l T, nth_error S l = Some T -> has_type G S (Loc l) (TyRef T).

Fixpoint shift_at (d : nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | Var x => if x <? d then Var x else Var (x + 1)
  | Num n => Num n | BOOL b => BOOL b
  | Succ t1 => Succ (shift_at d t1) | Pred t1 => Pred (shift_at d t1)
  | IsZero t1 => IsZero (shift_at d t1)
  | If t1 t2 t3 => If (shift_at d t1) (shift_at d t2) (shift_at d t3)
  | Lam T t1 => Lam T (shift_at (S d) t1)
  | App t1 t2 => App (shift_at d t1) (shift_at d t2)
  | Fix t1 => Fix (shift_at (S d) t1)
  | Ref t1 => Ref (shift_at d t1) | Deref t1 => Deref (shift_at d t1)
  | Assign t1 t2 => Assign (shift_at d t1) (shift_at d t2)
  | Loc l => Loc l
  end.

Definition shift (t : tm) : tm := shift_at 0 t.

Lemma has_type_shift_proper : forall G S t T T',
  has_type G S t T ->
  has_type (T' :: G) S (shift_at 0 t) T.
Proof.
  intros G S t T T' H. revert G S T T' H. induction t; intros G S T T' Ht.
  - (* Var *)
    inversion Ht; subst. simpl.
    destruct (n <? 0) eqn:Heq.
    + apply Nat.ltb_lt in Heq. lia.
    + apply Nat.ltb_ge in Heq.
      apply T_Var. rewrite Nat.add_1_r. simpl. assumption.
  - (* Num *)
    inversion Ht; subst. apply T_Num.
  - (* Bool *)
    inversion Ht; subst. apply T_Bool.
  - (* Succ *)
    inversion Ht; subst. apply T_Succ. apply IHt. assumption.
  - (* Pred *)
    inversion Ht; subst. apply T_Pred. apply IHt. assumption.
  - (* IsZero *)
    inversion Ht; subst. apply T_IsZero. apply IHt. assumption.
  - (* If *)
    inversion Ht; subst. apply T_If; [apply IHt1 | apply IHt2 | apply IHt3]; assumption.
  - (* Lam *)
    inversion Ht; subst. simpl. apply T_Lam. apply IHt. assumption.
  - (* App *)
    inversion Ht; subst. apply T_App; [apply IHt1 | apply IHt2]; assumption.
  - (* Fix *)
    inversion Ht; subst. simpl. apply T_Fix. apply IHt. assumption.
  - (* Ref *)
    inversion Ht; subst. apply T_Ref. apply IHt. assumption.
  - (* Deref *)
    inversion Ht; subst. apply T_Deref. apply IHt. assumption.
  - (* Assign *)
    inversion Ht; subst. apply T_Assign; [apply IHt1 | apply IHt2]; assumption.
  - (* Loc *)
    inversion Ht; subst. apply T_Loc. assumption.
Qed.

  | T_App : forall G S t1 t2 T1 T2, has_type G S t1 (TyArrow T1 T2) -> has_type G S t2 T1 -> has_type G S (App t1 t2) T2
  | T_Fix : forall G S t T, has_type (T :: G) S t T -> has_type G S (Fix t) T

      apply nth_error_Some_length in H2. lia.
      rewrite Nat.sub_add; auto.
      replace (x - length G1 + 1) with (S (x - length G1)) by lia.
      rewrite nth_error_app2; [| apply nth_error_Some_length in H2; lia].

input.content:
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia.
Import ListNotations.

Inductive ty : Type := TyNat | TyBool | TyArrow : ty -> ty -> ty | TyRef : ty -> ty.

Inductive tm : Type :=
  Var : nat -> tm | Num : nat -> tm | BOOL : bool -> tm
  | Succ : tm -> tm | Pred : tm -> tm | IsZero : tm -> tm
  | If : tm -> tm -> tm -> tm
  | Lam : ty -> tm -> tm | App : tm -> tm -> tm | Fix : tm -> tm
  | Ref : tm -> tm | Deref : tm -> tm | Assign : tm -> tm -> tm | Loc : nat -> tm.

Definition ctx := list ty.
Definition store_ty := list ty.

Inductive has_type : ctx -> store_ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Var : forall G S x T, nth_error G x = Some T -> has_type G S (Var x) T
  | T_Num : forall G S n, has_type G S (Num n) TyNat
  | T_Bool : forall G S b, has_type G S (BOOL b) TyBool
  | T_Succ : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Succ t) TyNat
  | T_Pred : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Pred t) TyNat
  | T_IsZero : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (IsZero t) TyBool
  | T_If : forall G S t1 t2 t3 T, has_type G S t1 TyBool -> has_type G S t2 T -> has_type G S t3 T -> has_type G S (If t1 t2 t3) T
  | T_Lam : forall G S T1 T2 t, has_type (T1 :: G) S t T2 -> has_type G S (Lam T1 t) (TyArrow T1 T2)
  | T_App : forall G S t1 t2 T1 T2, has_type G S t1 (TyArrow T1 T2) -> has_type G S t2 T1 -> has_type G S (App t1 t2) T2
  | T_Fix : forall G S t T, has_type (T :: G) S t T -> has_type G S (Fix t) T
  | T_Ref : forall G S t T, has_type G S t T -> has_type G S (Ref t) (TyRef T)
  | T_Deref : forall G S t T, has_type G S t (TyRef T) -> has_type G S (Deref t) T
  | T_Assign : forall G S t1 t2 T, has_type G S t1 (TyRef T) -> has_type G S t2 T -> has_type G S (Assign t1 t2) TyNat
  | T_Loc : forall G S l T, nth_error S l = Some T -> has_type G S (Loc l) (TyRef T).

Fixpoint shift_at (d : nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | Var x => if x <? d then Var x else Var (x + 1)
  | Num n => Num n | BOOL b => BOOL b
  | Succ t1 => Succ (shift_at d t1) | Pred t1 => Pred (shift_at d t1)
  | IsZero t1 => IsZero (shift_at d t1)
  | If t1 t2 t3 => If (shift_at d t1) (shift_at d t2) (shift_at d t3)
  | Lam T t1 => Lam T (shift_at (S d) t1)
  | App t1 t2 => App (shift_at d t1) (shift_at d t2)
  | Fix t1 => Fix (shift_at (S d) t1)
  | Ref t1 => Ref (shift_at d t1) | Deref t1 => Deref (shift_at d t1)
  | Assign t1 t2 => Assign (shift_at d t1) (shift_at d t2)
  | Loc l => Loc l
  end.

Lemma has_type_shift_gen : forall t,
  (forall G1 G2 S T T', has_type (G1 ++ G2) S t T -> has_type (G1 ++ T' :: G2) S (shift_at (length G1) t) T).
Proof.
  induction t; intros G1 G2 S T T' Ht; inversion Ht; subst; simpl.
  - destruct (x <? length G1) eqn:Heq.
    + apply T_Var. apply nth_error_app1. apply Nat.ltb_lt in Heq. exact Heq.
      rewrite <- H2. apply nth_error_app1. apply Nat.ltb_lt in Heq. exact Heq.
    + apply T_Var. apply nth_error_app2. apply Nat.ltb_ge in Heq. exact Heq.
      replace (x + 1 - length G1) with (S (x - length G1)) by lia.
      simpl. apply nth_error_app2.
      eapply nth_error_Some_length in H2. lia.
      rewrite Nat.sub_add. assumption. lia.
  - apply T_Num.
  - apply T_Bool.
  - apply T_Succ. apply IHt. assumption.
  - apply T_Pred. apply IHt. assumption.
  - apply T_IsZero. apply IHt. assumption.
  - apply T_If; [apply IHt1 | apply IHt2 | apply IHt3]; assumption.
  - apply T_Lam. simpl. apply (IHt (T1 :: G1) G2 S T2 T'). rewrite <- app_comm_cons. assumption.
  - apply T_App; [apply IHt1 | apply IHt2]; assumption.
  - apply T_Fix. simpl. apply (IHt (T0 :: G1) G2 S T0 T'). rewrite <- app_comm_cons. assumption.
  - apply T_Ref. apply IHt. assumption.
  - apply T_Deref. apply IHt. assumption.
  - apply T_Assign; [apply IHt1 | apply IHt2]; assumption.
  - apply T_Loc. assumption.
Qed.

part.text: Let me approach this differently. Instead of the general shift lemma, let me use the `stratify` tool on the preservation proof directly, and handle substitution inline. Let me first revert the complete file to have only working lemmas.
Let me write a clean file that compiles up to the preservation theorem (which I'll handle with stratify):

input.content:
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia.
Import ListNotations.

(** * PCF + References: Type Preservation — Benchmark *)

Inductive ty : Type :=
  | TyNat | TyBool | TyArrow : ty -> ty -> ty | TyRef : ty -> ty.

Inductive tm : Type :=
  | Var : nat -> tm | Num : nat -> tm | BOOL : bool -> tm
  | Succ : tm -> tm | Pred : tm -> tm | IsZero : tm -> tm
  | If : tm -> tm -> tm -> tm
  | Lam : ty -> tm -> tm | App : tm -> tm -> tm | Fix : tm -> tm
  | Ref : tm -> tm | Deref : tm -> tm | Assign : tm -> tm -> tm | Loc : nat -> tm.

Definition ctx := list ty.
Definition store_ty := list ty.

Inductive has_type : ctx -> store_ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Var : forall G S x T, nth_error G x = Some T -> has_type G S (Var x) T
  | T_Num : forall G S n, has_type G S (Num n) TyNat
  | T_Bool : forall G S b, has_type G S (BOOL b) TyBool
  | T_Succ : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Succ t) TyNat
  | T_Pred : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Pred t) TyNat
  | T_IsZero : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (IsZero t) TyBool
  | T_If : forall G S t1 t2 t3 T, has_type G S t1 TyBool -> has_type G S t2 T -> has_type G S t3 T -> has_type G S (If t1 t2 t3) T
  | T_Lam : forall G S T1 T2 t, has_type (T1 :: G) S t T2 -> has_type G S (Lam T1 t) (TyArrow T1 T2)
  | T_App : forall G S t1 t2 T1 T2, has_type G S t1 (TyArrow T1 T2) -> has_type G S t2 T1 -> has_type G S (App t1 t2) T2
  | T_Fix : forall G S t T, has_type (T :: G) S t T -> has_type G S (Fix t) T
  | T_Ref : forall G S t T, has_type G S t T -> has_type G S (Ref t) (TyRef T)
  | T_Deref : forall G S t T, has_type G S t (TyRef T) -> has_type G S (Deref t) T
  | T_Assign : forall G S t1 t2 T, has_type G S t1 (TyRef T) -> has_type G S t2 T -> has_type G S (Assign t1 t2) TyNat
  | T_Loc : forall G S l T, nth_error S l = Some T -> has_type G S (Loc l) (TyRef T).

Inductive value : tm -> Prop :=
  | V_Num : forall n, value (Num n)
  | V_Bool : forall b, value (BOOL b)
  | V_Lam : forall T t, value (Lam T t)
  | V_Loc : forall l, value (Loc l).

Fixpoint shift_at (d : nat) (t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | Var x => if x <? d then Var x else Var (x + 1)
  | Num n => Num n | BOOL b => BOOL b
  | Succ t1 => Succ (shift_at d t1) | Pred t1 => Pred (shift_at d t1)
  | IsZero t1 => IsZero (shift_at d t1)
  | If t1 t2 t3 => If (shift_at d t1) (shift_at d t2) (shift_at d t3)
  | Lam T t1 => Lam T (shift_at (S d) t1)
  | App t1 t2 => App (shift_at d t1) (shift_at d t2)
  | Fix t1 => Fix (shift_at (S d) t1)
  | Ref t1 => Ref (shift_at d t1) | Deref t1 => Deref (shift_at d t1)
  | Assign t1 t2 => Assign (shift_at d t1) (shift_at d t2)
  | Loc l => Loc l
  end.

Definition shift (t : tm) : tm := shift_at 0 t.

Fixpoint subst (j : nat) (s t : tm) : tm :=
  match t with
  | Var x => if Nat.eqb x j then s else Var x
  | Num n => Num n | BOOL b => BOOL b
  | Succ t1 => Succ (subst j s t1) | Pred t1 => Pred (subst j s t1)
  | IsZero t1 => IsZero (subst j s t1)
  | If t1 t2 t3 => If (subst j s t1) (subst j s t2) (subst j s t3)
  | Lam T t1 => Lam T (subst (S j) (shift s) t1)
  | App t1 t2 => App (subst j s t1) (subst j s t2)
  | Fix t1 => Fix (subst (S j) (shift s) t1)
  | Ref t1 => Ref (subst j s t1) | Deref t1 => Deref (subst j s t1)
  | Assign t1 t2 => Assign (subst j s t1) (subst j s t2)
  | Loc l => Loc l
  end.

Definition heap := list (nat * tm).

Fixpoint heap_lookup (l : nat) (mu : heap) : option tm :=
  match mu with
  | [] => None
  | (l', v) :: mu' => if Nat.eqb l l' then Some v else heap_lookup l mu'
  end.

Fixpoint heap_update (l : nat) (v : tm) (mu : heap) : heap :=
  match mu with
  | [] => []
  | (l', v') :: mu' => if Nat.eqb l l' then (l, v) :: mu'
                        else (l', v') :: heap_update l v mu'
  end.

Inductive heap_ok : heap -> store_ty -> Prop :=
  | heap_empty : forall S, heap_ok [] S
  | heap_cons : forall l v mu S T, heap_ok mu S -> has_type [] S v T -> nth_error S l = Some T -> heap_ok ((l, v) :: mu) S.

Inductive step : tm -> heap -> tm -> heap -> Prop :=
  | S_Succ : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (Succ t) mu (Succ t') mu'
  | S_PredZero : forall mu, step (Pred (Num 0)) mu (Num 0) mu
  | S_PredSucc : forall n mu, step (Pred (Num (S n))) mu (Num n) mu
  | S_Pred : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (Pred t) mu (Pred t') mu'
  | S_IsZeroZero : forall mu, step (IsZero (Num 0)) mu (BOOL true) mu
  | S_IsZeroSucc : forall n mu, step (IsZero (Num (S n))) mu (BOOL false) mu
  | S_IsZero : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (IsZero t) mu (IsZero t') mu'
  | S_IfTrue : forall t1 t2 mu, step (If (BOOL true) t1 t2) mu t1 mu
  | S_IfFalse : forall t1 t2 mu, step (If (BOOL false) t1 t2) mu t2 mu
  | S_If : forall t1 mu t1' mu' t2 t3, step t1 mu t1' mu' -> step (If t1 t2 t3) mu (If t1' t2 t3) mu'
  | S_App1 : forall t1 mu t1' mu' t2, step t1 mu t1' mu' -> step (App t1 t2) mu (App t1' t2) mu'
  | S_App2 : forall v1 t2 mu t2' mu', value v1 -> step t2 mu t2' mu' -> step (App v1 t2) mu (App v1 t2') mu'
  | S_AppAbs : forall T t1 v2 mu, value v2 -> step (App (Lam T t1) v2) mu (subst 0 v2 t1) mu
  | S_Fix : forall t mu, step (Fix t) mu (subst 0 (Fix t) t) mu
  | S_Ref : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (Ref t) mu (Ref t') mu'
  | S_RefV : forall v mu, value v -> step (Ref v) mu (Loc (length mu)) ((length mu, v) :: mu)
  | S_Deref : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (Deref t) mu (Deref t') mu'
  | S_DerefLoc : forall l mu v, heap_lookup l mu = Some v -> step (Deref (Loc l)) mu v mu
  | S_Assign1 : forall t1 mu t1' mu' t2, step t1 mu t1' mu' -> step (Assign t1 t2) mu (Assign t1' t2) mu'
  | S_Assign2 : forall l t2 mu t2' mu', step t2 mu t2' mu' -> step (Assign (Loc l) t2) mu (Assign (Loc l) t2') mu'
  | S_AssignV : forall l v mu, value v -> step (Assign (Loc l) v) mu (Num 0) (heap_update l v mu).

Definition extends (S' S : store_ty) : Prop := exists S2, S' = S ++ S2.

(** Helper lemmas *)

Lemma nth_error_Some_length : forall (A : Type) (l : list A) n x,
  nth_error l n = Some x -> n < length l.
Proof.
  intros A l n x H. apply nth_error_Some. rewrite H. discriminate.
Qed.

Lemma extends_refl : forall S, extends S S.
Proof.
  intros S. unfold extends. exists []. rewrite app_nil_r. reflexivity.
Qed.

Lemma has_type_store_weaken : forall G S t T S',
  has_type G S t T ->
  extends S' S ->
  has_type G S' t T.
Proof.
  intros G S t T S' Ht Hext. revert S' Hext. induction Ht; intros S' Hext.
  - apply T_Var. assumption.
  - apply T_Num.
  - apply T_Bool.
  - apply T_Succ. apply IHHt. assumption.
  - apply T_Pred. apply IHHt. assumption.
  - apply T_IsZero. apply IHHt. assumption.
  - apply T_If; [apply IHHt1 | apply IHHt2 | apply IHHt3]; assumption.
  - apply T_Lam. apply IHHt. assumption.
  - eapply T_App; [eapply IHHt1 | eapply IHHt2]; assumption.
  - apply T_Fix. apply IHHt. assumption.
  - apply T_Ref. apply IHHt. assumption.
  - apply T_Deref. apply IHHt. assumption.
  - eapply T_Assign; [eapply IHHt1 | eapply IHHt2]; assumption.
  - destruct Hext as [S2 HS']. rewrite HS'.
    apply T_Loc. rewrite (nth_error_app1 S S2). assumption.
    eapply nth_error_Some_length; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma heap_ok_lookup : forall mu S l v,
  heap_ok mu S ->
  heap_lookup l mu = Some v ->
  exists T, nth_error S l = Some T /\ has_type [] S v T.
Proof.
  induction mu; intros S l v Hok Hlk; simpl in *.
  - discriminate.
  - destruct a as [l' v']; inversion Hok; subst.
    destruct (Nat.eqb l l') eqn:Heq.
    + apply Nat.eqb_eq in Heq; subst l'. inversion Hlk; subst v'.
      exists T; auto.
    + apply IHmu; auto.
Qed.

Lemma heap_ok_update : forall mu S l v T,
  heap_ok mu S ->
  nth_error S l = Some T ->
  has_type [] S v T ->
  heap_ok (heap_update l v mu) S.
Proof.
  induction mu; intros S l v T Hok Hnth Hty.
  - apply heap_empty.
  - destruct a as [l' v']; inversion Hok; subst; simpl.
    destruct (Nat.eqb l l') eqn:Heq.
    + apply Nat.eqb_eq in Heq; subst l'.
      eapply heap_cons; eauto.
    + eapply heap_cons; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma heap_ok_extends : forall mu S S',
  heap_ok mu S ->
  extends S' S ->
  heap_ok mu S'.
Proof.
  induction mu; intros S S' Hok Hext.
  - apply heap_empty.
  - destruct a as [l v]; inversion Hok; subst.
    eapply heap_cons.
    + apply IHmu with (S := S); auto.
    + eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto.
    + unfold extends in Hext. destruct Hext as [S2 HS']. rewrite HS'.
      apply nth_error_app1. eapply nth_error_Some_length; eauto.
Qed.

Lemma length_heap_ok_le : forall mu S,
  heap_ok mu S ->
  length mu <= length S.
Proof.
  induction mu; intros S Hok.
  - lia.
  - destruct a as [l v]; inversion Hok; subst; simpl.
    apply IHmu in H3.
    assert (l < length S) by (eapply nth_error_Some_length; eauto).
    lia.
Qed.

(** ** Conjecture pairs *)

Theorem preservation :
  forall t mu t' mu' T S,
    has_type [] S t T ->
    step t mu t' mu' ->
    heap_ok mu S ->
    length mu >= length S ->
    exists S',
      extends S' S /\
      heap_ok mu' S' /\
      has_type [] S' t' T.
Proof.
  induction 2; intros T S Hty Hok Hlen.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H5; eauto.
    destruct H5 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    inversion H5. apply T_Num.
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    inversion H5. apply T_Num.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H5; eauto.
    destruct H5 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    apply T_Bool.
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    apply T_Bool.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H5; eauto.
    destruct H5 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H6; eauto.
    destruct H6 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H4; eauto.
    destruct H4 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    eapply T_App; eauto. apply has_type_store_weaken with (S := S); auto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H7; eauto.
    destruct H7 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    eapply T_App; eauto. eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto.
  - (* S_AppAbs: needs substitution lemma *)
    admit.
  - (* S_Fix: needs substitution lemma *)
    admit.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H5; eauto.
    destruct H5 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. inversion H5; subst.
    apply length_heap_ok_le in Hok. assert (Hlen_eq : length mu = length S) by lia.
    exists (S ++ [T]).
    split.
    { unfold extends. exists [T]. reflexivity. }
    split.
    { simpl. eapply heap_cons.
      - eapply heap_ok_extends; eauto.
      - eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto. unfold extends. exists [T]. reflexivity.
      - rewrite Hlen_eq. rewrite nth_error_app_right. simpl. reflexivity. }
    { eapply T_Loc.
      rewrite Hlen_eq. rewrite nth_error_app_right. simpl. reflexivity. }
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H5; eauto.
    destruct H5 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    eapply heap_ok_lookup in Hok; eauto.
    destruct Hok as [T0 [Hnth Htyv]].
    exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    inversion H6; subst. assumption.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H6; eauto.
    destruct H6 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    eapply T_Assign; eauto. eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H9; eauto.
    destruct H9 as [S0 [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S0. split; [| split]; auto.
    eapply T_Assign; eauto. eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. inversion H8; subst.
    eapply heap_ok_lookup in Hok as [T0 [Hnth Hokv]]; eauto.
    exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    + apply heap_ok_update with (T := T0); auto.
    + apply T_Num.
Admitted.

Theorem preservation_neg : ~ (
  forall t mu t' mu' T S,
    has_type [] S t T ->
    step t mu t' mu' ->
    heap_ok mu S ->
    length mu >= length S ->
    exists S',
      extends S' S /\
      heap_ok mu' S' /\
      has_type [] S' t' T).
Proof.
Admitted.

input.oldString:
Lemma length_heap_ok_le : forall mu S,
  heap_ok mu S ->
  length mu <= length S.
Proof.
  induction mu; intros S Hok.
  - apply Nat.le_0_l.
  - destruct a as [l v]. inversion Hok; subst; simpl.
    match goal with
    | H : heap_ok mu S |- _ => apply IHmu in H
    end.
    match goal with
    | H : nth_error S l = Some ?T |- _ => eapply nth_error_Some_length in H
    end.
    lia.
Qed.

(** ** Conjecture pairs *)
input.newString:
Lemma nth_error_repeat : forall (A : Type) (x : A) k n,
  n < k -> nth_error (repeat x k) n = Some x.
Proof.
  induction k; intros n Hlt.
  - lia.
  - simpl. destruct n.
    + reflexivity.
    + apply IHk. lia.
Qed.

Lemma nth_error_pad_right : forall (A : Type) (l : list A) (x : A) k n,
  nth_error l n = None ->
  n < length l + k ->
  nth_error (l ++ repeat x k) n = Some x.
Proof.
  intros A l x k n Hnone Hlt.
  apply nth_error_app2. apply nth_error_Some in Hnone. lia.
  assert (n - length l < k) by lia.
  rewrite (nth_error_repeat A x k (n - length l) H).
  f_equal. lia.
Qed.

(** ** Conjecture pairs *)

Lemma nth_error_pad_right : forall (A : Type) (l : list A) (x : A) k n,
  nth_error l n = None ->
  n < length l + k ->
  nth_error (l ++ repeat x k) n = Some x.

  rewrite nth_error_app2. 2: { apply nth_error_Some in Hnone. lia. }

  rewrite (nth_error_repeat A x k (n - length l) H). reflexivity.
Qed.

input.oldString:
Lemma nth_error_pad_right : forall (A : Type) (l : list A) (x : A) k n,
  nth_error l n = None ->
  n < length l + k ->
  nth_error (l ++ repeat x k) n = Some x.
Proof.
  intros A l x k n Hnone Hlt.
  rewrite nth_error_app2 by (apply nth_error_Some in Hnone; lia).
  assert (n - length l < k) by lia.
  rewrite (nth_error_repeat A x k (n - length l) H). reflexivity.
Qed.
input.newString:
Lemma nth_error_pad_right : forall (A : Type) (l : list A) (x : A) k n,
  nth_error l n = None ->
  n < length l + k ->
  nth_error (l ++ repeat x k) n = Some x.
Proof.
  intros A l x k n Hnone Hlt.
  apply nth_error_Some in Hnone as Hge.
  rewrite nth_error_app2.
  - assert (n - length l < k) by lia.
    rewrite (nth_error_repeat A x k (n - length l) H). reflexivity.
  - lia.
Qed.

input.oldString:
Theorem preservation :
  forall t mu t' mu' T S,
    has_type [] S t T ->
    step t mu t' mu' ->
    heap_ok mu S ->
    length mu >= length S ->
    exists S',
      extends S' S /\
      heap_ok mu' S' /\
      has_type [] S' t' T.
Proof.
  intros t mu t' mu' Ty St Hty Hstep Hok Hlen.
  induction Hstep in Ty, St, Hty, Hok, Hlen |- *.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H5; eauto.
    destruct H5 as [S' [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S'. split; [| split]; auto.
    econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    inversion H5. apply T_Num.
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    inversion H5. apply T_Num.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H5; eauto.
    destruct H5 as [S' [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S'. split; [| split]; auto.
    econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    apply T_Bool.
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    apply T_Bool.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H5; eauto.
    destruct H5 as [S' [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S'. split; [| split]; auto.
    econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
  - inversion Hty; subst. exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H6; eauto.
    destruct H6 as [S' [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S'. split; [| split]; auto.
    econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H4; eauto.
    destruct H4 as [S' [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S'. split; [| split]; auto.
    eapply T_App; eauto. apply has_type_store_weaken with (S := S); auto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H7; eauto.
    destruct H7 as [S' [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S'. split; [| split]; auto.
    eapply T_App; eauto. eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto.
  - (* S_AppAbs: needs substitution lemma *)
    admit.
  - (* S_Fix: needs substitution lemma *)
    admit.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H5; eauto.
    destruct H5 as [S' [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S'. split; [| split]; auto.
    econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. inversion H5; subst.
    set (pad := length mu - length S).
    exists (S ++ repeat TyNat pad ++ [T]).
    split.
    { unfold extends. exists (repeat TyNat pad ++ [T]). reflexivity. }
    split.
    { simpl. eapply heap_cons.
      - eapply heap_ok_extends; eauto.
      - eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto.
        unfold extends. exists (repeat TyNat pad ++ [T]). reflexivity.
      - rewrite app_assoc. apply nth_error_pad_right.
        + apply nth_error_None. lia.
        + rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. }
    { eapply T_Loc. rewrite app_assoc. apply nth_error_pad_right.
      + apply nth_error_None. lia.
      + rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. }
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H5; eauto.
    destruct H5 as [S' [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S'. split; [| split]; auto.
    econstructor; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    eapply heap_ok_lookup in Hok; eauto.
    destruct Hok as [T1 [Hnth Htyv]].
    exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    inversion H6; subst. assumption.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H6; eauto.
    destruct H6 as [S' [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S'. split; [| split]; auto.
    eapply T_Assign; eauto. eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. eapply IHstep in H9; eauto.
    destruct H9 as [S' [Hext [Hok' Hty']]].
    exists S'. split; [| split]; auto.
    eapply T_Assign; eauto. eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto.
  - inversion Hty; subst. inversion H8; subst.
    eapply heap_ok_lookup in Hok as [T1 [Hnth Hokv]]; eauto.
    exists S. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
    + apply heap_ok_update with (T := T1); auto.
    + apply T_Num.
Admitted.

metadata.preview:
(** ** Conjecture pairs *)

Theorem preservation :
  forall t mu t' mu' T S,
    has_type [] S t T ->
    step t mu t' mu' ->
    heap_ok mu S ->
    length mu >= length S ->
    exists S',
      extends S' S /\
      heap_ok mu' S' /\
      has_type [] S' t' T.
Proof.
  intros t0 mu t'0 mu' Ty St Hty Hstep Hok Hlen; revert Ty St Hty Hok Hlen; induction Hstep; intros Ty St Hty Hok Hlen.
  { (* case_1:f9147132 *) admit. }
  { (* case_2:98dbb9a9 *) solve [ inversion Hty; subst; eauto 6 using extends_refl, has_type_store_weaken, heap_ok_lookup, heap_ok_update, heap_ok_extends ]. }
  { (* case_3:a91156a1 *) admit. }
  { (* case_4:774ff43b *) admit. }
  { (* case_5:cef20d06 *) inversion Hty; subst. exists St. split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto]. apply T_Bool.

cd /tmp/bench_pcf_ref_deepseek_deepseek-v4-pro_standard_1782286146_401194_lqbG2g && cat > /tmp/test_case2.v << 'EOF'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia.
Import ListNotations.
Inductive ty : Type := TyNat | TyBool | TyArrow : ty -> ty -> ty | TyRef : ty -> ty.
Inductive tm : Type :=
  Var : nat -> tm | Num : nat -> tm | BOOL : bool -> tm
  | Succ : tm -> tm | Pred : tm -> tm | IsZero : tm -> tm
  | If : tm -> tm -> tm -> tm
  | Lam : ty -> tm -> tm | App : tm -> tm -> tm | Fix : tm -> tm
  | Ref : tm -> tm | Deref : tm -> tm | Assign : tm -> tm -> tm | Loc : nat -> tm.
Definition ctx := list ty.
Definition store_ty := list ty.
Inductive has_type : ctx -> store_ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Var : forall G S x T, nth_error G x = Some T -> has_type G S (Var x) T
  | T_Num : forall G S n, has_type G S (Num n) TyNat
  | T_Bool : forall G S b, has_type G S (BOOL b) TyBool
  | T_Succ : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Succ t) TyNat
  | T_Pred : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Pred t) TyNat.
Definition extends (S' S : store_ty) : Prop := exists S2, S' = S ++ S2.
Lemma extends_refl : forall S, extends S S.
Proof. intros S. unfold extends. exists []. rewrite app_nil_r. reflexivity. Qed.
Goal forall (St : store_ty) (Ty : ty), has_type [] St (Pred (Num 0)) Ty -> exists S', extends S' St /\ has_type [] S' (Num 0) Ty.
Proof.
  intros St Ty Hty. inversion Hty; subst.
  Show.
Abort.
EOF
coqc /tmp/test_case2.v 2>&1 | head -10

input.description: Test inversion for S_AppAbs and S_Fix
input.command:
cd /tmp/bench_pcf_ref_deepseek_deepseek-v4-pro_standard_1782286146_401194_lqbG2g && cat > /tmp/test_appabs.v << 'EOF'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia.
Import ListNotations.
Inductive ty : Type := TyNat | TyBool | TyArrow : ty -> ty -> ty | TyRef : ty -> ty.
Inductive tm : Type :=
  Var : nat -> tm | Num : nat -> tm | BOOL : bool -> tm
  | Succ : tm -> tm | Pred : tm -> tm | IsZero : tm -> tm
  | If : tm -> tm -> tm -> tm
  | Lam : ty -> tm -> tm | App : tm -> tm -> tm | Fix : tm -> tm
  | Ref : tm -> tm | Deref : tm -> tm | Assign : tm -> tm -> tm | Loc : nat -> tm.
Definition ctx := list ty.
Definition store_ty := list ty.
Inductive has_type : ctx -> store_ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Var : forall G S x T, nth_error G x = Some T -> has_type G S (Var x) T
  | T_Num : forall G S n, has_type G S (Num n) TyNat
  | T_Bool : forall G S b, has_type G S (BOOL b) TyBool
  | T_Succ : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Succ t) TyNat
  | T_Pred : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Pred t) TyNat
  | T_IsZero : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (IsZero t) TyBool
  | T_If : forall G S t1 t2 t3 T, has_type G S t1 TyBool -> has_type G S t2 T -> has_type G S t3 T -> has_type G S (If t1 t2 t3) T
  | T_Lam : forall G S T1 T2 t, has_type (T1 :: G) S t T2 -> has_type G S (Lam T1 t) (TyArrow T1 T2)
  | T_App : forall G S t1 t2 T1 T2, has_type G S t1 (TyArrow T1 T2) -> has_type G S t2 T1 -> has_type G S (App t1 t2) T2
  | T_Fix : forall G S t T, has_type (T :: G) S t T -> has_type G S (Fix t) T
  | T_Ref : forall G S t T, has_type G S t T -> has_type G S (Ref t) (TyRef T)
  | T_Deref : forall G S t T, has_type G S t (TyRef T) -> has_type G S (Deref t) T
  | T_Assign : forall G S t1 t2 T, has_type G S t1 (TyRef T) -> has_type G S t2 T -> has_type G S (Assign t1 t2) TyNat
  | T_Loc : forall G S l T, nth_error S l = Some T -> has_type G S (Loc l) (TyRef T).
Goal forall (St : store_ty) (Ty : ty) (T : ty) (t1 v2 : tm), has_type [] St (App (Lam T t1) v2) Ty -> True.
Proof.
  intros St Ty T t1 v2 Hty. inversion Hty; subst. inversion H5; subst.
  Show.
  exact I.
Qed.
EOF
coqc /tmp/test_appabs.v 2>&1 | head -20

input.command:
cd /tmp/bench_pcf_ref_deepseek_deepseek-v4-pro_standard_1782286146_401194_lqbG2g && python3 -c "
import re
with open('benchmarks/complete/pcf_ref.v', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()

# Replace all edestruct that don't have explicit params
# Pattern: edestruct IHHstep as [Snew ...]; [eauto ... | eauto | eauto];
old = 'edestruct IHHstep as [Snew [Hext [Hok'\"'\"' Hty'\"'\"']]]; [eauto with nocore | eauto | eauto].'
new = 'edestruct IHHstep as [Snew [Hext [Hok'\"'\"' Hty'\"'\"']]]; [eauto | eauto | eauto].'

# Simpler approach: change each line
lines = content.split('\n')
for i, line in enumerate(lines):
    if 'edestruct IHHstep' in line and 'eauto' in line:
        # Count subgoals needed - it's 3 after with clause
        # Replace the tactical part
        line = re.sub(r'\[eauto with nocore \| eauto \| eauto\]\.', '[eauto | eauto | eauto].', line)
        lines[i] = line
        
with open('benchmarks/complete/pcf_ref.v', 'w') as f:
    f.write('\n'.join(lines))
print('Done')
"

From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia.
Import ListNotations.
Inductive ty : Type := TyNat | TyBool | TyArrow : ty -> ty -> ty | TyRef : ty -> ty.
Inductive tm : Type :=
  Var : nat -> tm | Num : nat -> tm | BOOL : bool -> tm
  | Succ : tm -> tm | Pred : tm -> tm | IsZero : tm -> tm
  | If : tm -> tm -> tm -> tm
  | Lam : ty -> tm -> tm | App : tm -> tm -> tm | Fix : tm -> tm
  | Ref : tm -> tm | Deref : tm -> tm | Assign : tm -> tm -> tm | Loc : nat -> tm.
Definition ctx := list ty.
Definition store_ty := list ty.
Inductive has_type : ctx -> store_ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Var : forall G S x T, nth_error G x = Some T -> has_type G S (Var x) T
  | T_Num : forall G S n, has_type G S (Num n) TyNat
  | T_Bool : forall G S b, has_type G S (BOOL b) TyBool
  | T_Succ : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Succ t) TyNat.
Definition heap := list (nat * tm).
Inductive step : tm -> heap -> tm -> heap -> Prop :=
  | S_Succ : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (Succ t) mu (Succ t') mu'.
Definition extends (S' S : store_ty) : Prop := exists S2, S' = S ++ S2.
Lemma extends_refl : forall S, extends S S.
Proof. intros S. unfold extends. exists []. rewrite app_nil_r. reflexivity. Qed.
Goal forall (St : store_ty) (t mu t' mu' : tm) (Ty : ty), has_type [] St (Succ t) Ty -> True.
Proof.
  intros St t mu t' mu' Ty Hty.
  inversion Hty; subst.
  match goal with Hsub : has_type [] St t ?subT |- _ => idtac Hsub subT end.
  exact I.
Qed.
ENDOFFILE

  | Ref : tm -> tm | Deref : tm -> tm | Assign : tm -> tm -> tm | Loc : nat -> tm.
Definition ctx := list ty.

Inductive has_type : ctx -> store_ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Var : forall G S x T, nth_error G x = Some T -> has_type G S (Var x) T
  | T_Num : forall G S n, has_type G S (Num n) TyNat
  | T_Bool : forall G S b, has_type G S (BOOL b) TyBool
  | T_Succ : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Succ t) TyNat
  | T_Pred : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Pred t) TyNat
  | T_IsZero : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (IsZero t) TyBool
  | T_If : forall G S t1 t2 t3 T, has_type G S t1 TyBool -> has_type G S t2 T -> has_type G S t3 T -> has_type G S (If t1 t2 t3) T
  | T_Lam : forall G S T1 T2 t, has_type (T1 :: G) S t T2 -> has_type G S (Lam T1 t) (TyArrow T1 T2)
  | T_App : forall G S t1 t2 T1 T2, has_type G S t1 (TyArrow T1 T2) -> has_type G S t2 T1 -> has_type G S (App t1 t2) T2
  | T_Fix : forall G S t T, has_type (T :: G) S t T -> has_type G S (Fix t) T
  | T_Ref : forall G S t T, has_type G S t T -> has_type G S (Ref t) (TyRef T)
  | T_Deref : forall G S t T, has_type G S t (TyRef T) -> has_type G S (Deref t) T
  | T_Assign : forall G S t1 t2 T, has_type G S t1 (TyRef T) -> has_type G S t2 T -> has_type G S (Assign t1 t2) TyNat
  | T_Loc : forall G S l T, nth_error S l = Some T -> has_type G S (Loc l) (TyRef T).
Definition heap := list (nat * tm).
Inductive step : tm -> heap -> tm -> heap -> Prop :=
  | S_Succ : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (Succ t) mu (Succ t') mu'.

Proof.

cd /tmp/bench_pcf_ref_deepseek_deepseek-v4-pro_standard_1782286146_401194_lqbG2g && cat > /tmp/test_match2.v << 'EOF'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia.
Import ListNotations.
Inductive ty : Type := TyNat | TyBool | TyArrow : ty -> ty -> ty | TyRef : ty -> ty.
Inductive tm : Type :=
  Var : nat -> tm | Num : nat -> tm | BOOL : bool -> tm
  | Succ : tm -> tm | Pred : tm -> tm | IsZero : tm -> tm
  | If : tm -> tm -> tm -> tm
  | Lam : ty -> tm -> tm | App : tm -> tm -> tm | Fix : tm -> tm
  | Ref : tm -> tm | Deref : tm -> tm | Assign : tm -> tm -> tm | Loc : nat -> tm.
Definition ctx := list ty.
Definition store_ty := list ty.
Inductive has_type : ctx -> store_ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Var : forall G S x T, nth_error G x = Some T -> has_type G S (Var x) T
  | T_Succ : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Succ t) TyNat
  | T_App : forall G S t1 t2 T1 T2, has_type G S t1 (TyArrow T1 T2) -> has_type G S t2 T1 -> has_type G S (App t1 t2) T2
  | T_Fix : forall G S t T, has_type (T :: G) S t T -> has_type G S (Fix t) T.
Definition heap := list (nat * tm).
Inductive step : tm -> heap -> tm -> heap -> Prop :=
  | S_Succ : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (Succ t) mu (Succ t') mu'.
Definition extends (S' S : store_ty) : Prop := exists S2, S' = S ++ S2.

Goal forall (t mu t' mu' : tm) (Ty : ty) (St : store_ty), has_type [] St (Succ t) Ty -> step (Succ t) mu (Succ t') mu' -> True.
Proof.
  intros t0 mu t'0 mu' Ty St Hty Hstep.
  revert Ty St Hty. induction Hstep; intros Ty St Hty.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    match goal with Hsub : has_type [] St t ?subT |- _ => idtac Hsub subT end.
    exact I.
Qed.
EOF
coqc /tmp/test_match2.v 2>&1

From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia.
Import ListNotations.
Inductive ty : Type := TyNat | TyBool | TyArrow : ty -> ty -> ty | TyRef : ty -> ty.
Inductive tm : Type :=
  Var : nat -> tm | Num : nat -> tm | BOOL : bool -> tm
  | Succ : tm -> tm | Pred : tm -> tm | IsZero : tm -> tm
  | If : tm -> tm -> tm -> tm
  | Lam : ty -> tm -> tm | App : tm -> tm -> tm | Fix : tm -> tm
  | Ref : tm -> tm | Deref : tm -> tm | Assign : tm -> tm -> tm | Loc : nat -> tm.
Definition ctx := list ty.
Definition store_ty := list ty.
Inductive has_type : ctx -> store_ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Succ : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Succ t) TyNat.
Definition heap := list (nat * tm).
Inductive step : tm -> heap -> tm -> heap -> Prop :=
  | S_Succ : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (Succ t) mu (Succ t') mu'.

Goal forall (t : tm) (mu : heap) (t' : tm) (mu' : heap) (Ty : ty) (St : store_ty), has_type [] St (Succ t) Ty -> True.
Proof.
  intros t mu t' mu' Ty St Hty.
  inversion Hty; subst.
  match goal with Hsub : has_type [] St t ?subT |- _ => idtac Hsub subT end.
  exact I.
Qed.
EOF

input.command:
cd /tmp/bench_pcf_ref_deepseek_deepseek-v4-pro_standard_1782286146_401194_lqbG2g && cat > /tmp/test_exact.v << 'EOF'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia.
Import ListNotations.
Inductive ty : Type := TyNat | TyBool | TyArrow : ty -> ty -> ty | TyRef : ty -> ty.
Inductive tm : Type :=
  Var : nat -> tm | Num : nat -> tm | BOOL : bool -> tm
  | Succ : tm -> tm | Pred : tm -> tm | IsZero : tm -> tm
  | If : tm -> tm -> tm -> tm
  | Lam : ty -> tm -> tm | App : tm -> tm -> tm | Fix : tm -> tm
  | Ref : tm -> tm | Deref : tm -> tm | Assign : tm -> tm -> tm | Loc : nat -> tm.
Definition ctx := list ty.
Definition store_ty := list ty.
Inductive has_type : ctx -> store_ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Var : forall G S x T, nth_error G x = Some T -> has_type G S (Var x) T
  | T_Num : forall G S n, has_type G S (Num n) TyNat
  | T_Bool : forall G S b, has_type G S (BOOL b) TyBool
  | T_Succ : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Succ t) TyNat
  | T_Pred : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (Pred t) TyNat
  | T_IsZero : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (IsZero t) TyBool
  | T_If : forall G S t1 t2 t3 T, has_type G S t1 TyBool -> has_type G S t2 T -> has_type G S t3 T -> has_type G S (If t1 t2 t3) T
  | T_Lam : forall G S T1 T2 t, has_type (T1 :: G) S t T2 -> has_type G S (Lam T1 t) (TyArrow T1 T2)
  | T_App : forall G S t1 t2 T1 T2, has_type G S t1 (TyArrow T1 T2) -> has_type G S t2 T1 -> has_type G S (App t1 t2) T2
  | T_Fix : forall G S t T, has_type (T :: G) S t T -> has_type G S (Fix t) T
  | T_Ref : forall G S t T, has_type G S t T -> has_type G S (Ref t) (TyRef T)
  | T_Deref : forall G S t T, has_type G S t (TyRef T) -> has_type G S (Deref t) T
  | T_Assign : forall G S t1 t2 T, has_type G S t1 (TyRef T) -> has_type G S t2 T -> has_type G S (Assign t1 t2) TyNat
  | T_Loc : forall G S l T, nth_error S l = Some T -> has_type G S (Loc l) (TyRef T).
Definition heap := list (nat * tm).
Inductive step : tm -> heap -> tm -> heap -> Prop :=
  | S_Succ : forall t mu t' mu', step t mu t' mu' -> step (Succ t) mu (Succ t') mu'.
Inductive heap_ok : heap -> store_ty -> Prop := heap_empty : forall S, heap_ok [] S.
Definition extends (S' S : store_ty) : Prop := exists S2, S' = S ++ S2.

Goal forall (t0 : tm) (mu : heap) (t'0 : tm) (mu' : heap) (Ty : ty) (St : store_ty),
  has_type [] St (Succ t0) Ty ->
  step t0 mu t'0 mu' ->
  heap_ok mu St ->
  length mu >= length St ->
  exists S', extends S' St /\ heap_ok mu' S' /\ has_type [] S' (Succ t'0) Ty.
Proof.
  intros t0 mu t'0 mu' Ty St Hty Hstep Hok Hlen.
  revert Ty St Hty Hok Hlen. induction Hstep; intros Ty St Hty Hok Hlen.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    match goal with Hsub : has_type [] St t ?subT |- _ =>
      edestruct IHHstep with (Ty := subT) (St := St) as [Snew [Hext [Hok' Hty']]];
        [exact Hsub | exact Hok | exact Hlen]
    end.
    exists Snew; split; [| split]; auto. apply T_Succ; auto.
Qed.
EOF
coqc /tmp/test_exact.v 2>&1

Proof.
  intros t0 mu t'0 mu' Ty St Hty Hstep Hok Hlen; revert Ty St Hty Hok Hlen; induction Hstep; intros Ty St Hty Hok Hlen.
  - (* S_Succ *) inversion Hty; subst. match goal with H : has_type [] St t _ |- _ => apply IHHstep with (Ty := TyNat) (St := St) in H; [| exact Hok | exact Hlen]; destruct H as [Snew [Hext [Hok' Hty']]] end. exists Snew; split; [| split]; auto. apply T_Succ; auto.
  - (* S_PredZero *) inversion Hty; subst. match goal with H : has_type [] St (Num 0) _ |- _ => inversion H; subst; clear H end. exists St; split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto]. apply T_Num.
  - (* S_PredSucc *) inversion Hty; subst. match goal with H : has_type [] St (Num (S _)) _ |- _ => inversion H; subst; clear H end. exists St; split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto]. apply T_Num.
  - (* S_Pred *) inversion Hty; subst. match goal with H : has_type [] St t _ |- _ => apply IHHstep with (Ty := TyNat) (St := St) in H; [| exact Hok | exact Hlen]; destruct H as [Snew [Hext [Hok' Hty']]] end. exists Snew; split; [| split]; auto. apply T_Pred; auto.
  - (* S_IsZeroZero *) inversion Hty; subst. exists St; split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto]. apply T_Bool.
  - (* S_IsZeroSucc *) inversion Hty; subst. exists St; split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto]. apply T_Bool.
  - (* S_IsZero *) inversion Hty; subst. match goal with H : has_type [] St t _ |- _ => apply IHHstep with (Ty := TyNat) (St := St) in H; [| exact Hok | exact Hlen]; destruct H as [Snew [Hext [Hok' Hty']]] end. exists Snew; split; [| split]; auto. apply T_IsZero; auto.
  - (* S_IfTrue *) inversion Hty; subst. exists St; split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
  - (* S_IfFalse *) inversion Hty; subst. exists St; split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
  - (* S_If *) inversion Hty; subst. match goal with H : has_type [] St t1 _ |- _ => apply IHHstep with (Ty := TyBool) (St := St) in H; [| exact Hok | exact Hlen]; destruct H as [Snew [Hext [Hok' Hty']]] end. exists Snew; split; [| split]; auto. eapply T_If; eauto.
  - (* S_App1 *) inversion Hty; subst. match goal with H : has_type [] St t1 _ |- _ => apply IHHstep with (Ty := TyArrow T1 Ty) (St := St) in H; [| exact Hok | exact Hlen]; destruct H as [Snew [Hext [Hok' Hty']]] end. exists Snew; split; [| split]; auto. eapply T_App; eauto. eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto.
  - (* S_App2 *) inversion Hty; subst. match goal with H : has_type [] St t2 _ |- _ => apply IHHstep with (Ty := T1) (St := St) in H; [| exact Hok | exact Hlen]; destruct H as [Snew [Hext [Hok' Hty']]] end. exists Snew; split; [| split]; auto. eapply T_App; eauto. eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto.
  - (* S_AppAbs *) inversion Hty; subst. inversion H3; subst. exists St; split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto]. eapply has_type_subst; eauto.
  - (* S_Fix *) pose proof Hty as Hty_copy. inversion Hty; subst. exists St; split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto]. eapply has_type_subst; [apply Hty_copy | apply H4].
  - (* S_Ref *) inversion Hty; subst. match goal with H : has_type [] St t ?T0 |- _ => apply IHHstep with (Ty := T0) (St := St) in H; [| exact Hok | exact Hlen]; destruct H as [Snew [Hext [Hok' Hty']]] end. exists Snew; split; [| split]; auto. apply T_Ref; auto.
  - (* S_RefV *) inversion Hty; subst. match goal with H : has_type [] St v ?T0 |- _ => set (pad := length mu - length St); exists (St ++ repeat TyNat pad ++ [T0]) end. split. { unfold extends. exists (repeat TyNat pad ++ [T0]). reflexivity. } split. { simpl. eapply heap_cons. - eapply heap_ok_extends; eauto. - eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto. unfold extends. exists (repeat TyNat pad ++ [T0]). reflexivity. - rewrite app_assoc. apply nth_error_pad_right. + apply nth_error_None. lia. + rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. } { eapply T_Loc. rewrite app_assoc. apply nth_error_pad_right. + apply nth_error_None. lia. + rewrite app_length. simpl. lia. }
  - (* S_Deref *) inversion Hty; subst. match goal with H : has_type [] St t _ |- _ => apply IHHstep with (Ty := TyRef Ty) (St := St) in H; [| exact Hok | exact Hlen]; destruct H as [Snew [Hext [Hok' Hty']]] end. exists Snew; split; [| split]; auto. apply T_Deref; auto.
  - (* S_DerefLoc *) inversion Hty; subst. eapply heap_ok_lookup in Hok; eauto. destruct Hok as [T0 [Hnth Htyv]]. match goal with Hloc : has_type [] St (Loc l) _ |- _ => inversion Hloc; subst end. exists St; split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto].
  - (* S_Assign1 *) inversion Hty; subst. match goal with H : has_type [] St t1 _ |- _ => apply IHHstep with (Ty := TyRef T) (St := St) in H; [| exact Hok | exact Hlen]; destruct H as [Snew [Hext [Hok' Hty']]] end. exists Snew; split; [| split]; auto. eapply T_Assign; eauto. eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto.
  - (* S_Assign2 *) inversion Hty; subst. match goal with H : has_type [] St t2 _ |- _ => apply IHHstep with (Ty := T) (St := St) in H; [| exact Hok | exact Hlen]; destruct H as [Snew [Hext [Hok' Hty']]] end. exists Snew; split; [| split]; auto. eapply T_Assign; eauto. eapply has_type_store_weaken; eauto.
  - (* S_AssignV *) inversion Hty; subst. eapply heap_ok_lookup in Hok as [T0' [Hnth Hokv]]; eauto. exists St; split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto]. + apply heap_ok_update with (T := T); auto. + apply T_Num.
Qed.

input.command:
cd /tmp/bench_pcf_ref_deepseek_deepseek-v4-pro_standard_1782286146_401194_lqbG2g && cat > /tmp/test_izz.v << 'EOF'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia.
Import ListNotations.
Inductive ty : Type := TyNat | TyBool.
Inductive tm : Type := Num : nat -> tm | BOOL : bool -> tm | IsZero : tm -> tm.
Definition store_ty := list ty.
Inductive has_type : list ty -> store_ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Bool : forall G S b, has_type G S (BOOL b) TyBool
  | T_IsZero : forall G S t, has_type G S t TyNat -> has_type G S (IsZero t) TyBool.
Definition heap := list (nat * tm).
Inductive heap_ok : heap -> store_ty -> Prop := heap_empty : forall S, heap_ok [] S.
Definition extends (S' S : store_ty) : Prop := exists S2, S' = S ++ S2.
Lemma extends_refl : forall S, extends S S.
Proof. intros S. unfold extends. exists []. rewrite app_nil_r. reflexivity. Qed.

Goal forall (St : store_ty) (mu : heap) (Ty : ty),
  has_type [] St (IsZero (Num 0)) Ty -> heap_ok mu St -> exists S', extends S' St /\ heap_ok mu S' /\ has_type [] S' (BOOL true) Ty.
Proof.
  intros St mu Ty Hty Hok. inversion Hty; subst. exists St; split; [apply extends_refl | split; auto]. apply T_Bool.
Qed.
EOF
coqc /tmp/test_izz.v 2>&1

cd /tmp/bench_pcf_ref_deepseek_deepseek-v4-pro_standard_1782286146_401194_lqbG2g && cat > /tmp/test_if.v << 'EOF'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia.
Import ListNotations.
Inductive ty : Type := TyNat | TyBool | TyArrow : ty -> ty -> ty.
Inductive tm : Type :=
  Num : nat -> tm | BOOL : bool -> tm
  | If : tm -> tm -> tm -> tm.
Definition store_ty := list ty.
Inductive has_type : list ty -> store_ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Bool : forall G S b, has_type G S (BOOL b) TyBool
  | T_If : forall G S t1 t2 t3 T, has_type G S t1 TyBool -> has_type G S t2 T -> has_type G S t3 T -> has_type G S (If t1 t2 t3) T.
Definition heap := list (nat * tm).
Inductive step : tm -> heap -> tm -> heap -> Prop :=
  | S_If : forall t1 mu t1' mu' t2 t3, step t1 mu t1' mu' -> step (If t1 t2 t3) mu (If t1' t2 t3) mu'.
Inductive heap_ok : heap -> store_ty -> Prop := heap_empty : forall S, heap_ok [] S.
Definition extends (S' S : store_ty) : Prop := exists S2, S' = S ++ S2.

Goal forall (t1 : tm) (mu : heap) (t1' : tm) (mu' : heap) (t2 t3 : tm) (Ty : ty) (St : store_ty),
  has_type [] St (If t1 t2 t3) Ty ->
  step t1 mu t1' mu' ->
  heap_ok mu St -> length mu >= length St ->
  (forall Ty St, has_type [] St t1 Ty -> heap_ok mu St -> length mu >= length St -> exists S', extends S' St /\ heap_ok mu' S' /\ has_type [] S' t1' Ty) ->
  exists S', extends S' St /\ heap_ok mu' S' /\ has_type [] S' (If t1' t2 t3) Ty.
Proof.
  intros t1 mu t1' mu' t2 t3 Ty St Hty Hstep Hok Hlen IHHstep.
  revert Ty St Hty Hok Hlen. induction Hstep; intros Ty St Hty Hok Hlen.
  - inversion Hty; subst.
    match goal with H : has_type [] St t1 _ |- _ => idtac "found" H end.
Abort.
EOF
coqc /tmp/test_if.v 2>&1

  | T_If : forall G S t1 t2 t3 T, has_type G S t1 TyBool -> has_type G S t2 T -> has_type G S t3 T -> has_type G S (If t1 t2 t3) T.
Definition heap := list (nat * tm).
Inductive step : tm -> heap -> tm -> heap -> Prop :=
  | S_If : forall t1 mu t1' mu' t2 t3, step t1 mu t1' mu' -> step (If t1 t2 t3) mu (If t1' t2 t3) mu'.

cd /tmp/bench_pcf_ref_deepseek_deepseek-v4-pro_standard_1782286146_401194_lqbG2g && cat > /tmp/test_abs.v << 'EOF'
From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia.
Import ListNotations.
Inductive ty : Type := TyNat | TyBool | TyArrow : ty -> ty -> ty.
Inductive tm : Type :=
  Var : nat -> tm | Num : nat -> tm | Lam : ty -> tm -> tm | App : tm -> tm -> tm.
Definition store_ty := list ty.
Inductive has_type : list ty -> store_ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Lam : forall G S T1 T2 t, has_type (T1 :: G) S t T2 -> has_type G S (Lam T1 t) (TyArrow T1 T2)
  | T_App : forall G S t1 t2 T1 T2, has_type G S t1 (TyArrow T1 T2) -> has_type G S t2 T1 -> has_type G S (App t1 t2) T2.
Inductive value : tm -> Prop := V_Lam : forall T t, value (Lam T t).
Inductive step : tm -> list (nat * tm) -> tm -> list (nat * tm) -> Prop :=
  | S_AppAbs : forall T t1 v2 mu, value v2 -> step (App (Lam T t1) v2) mu (subst 0 v2 t1) mu.
Fixpoint subst (j : nat) (s t : tm) : tm := t.
Goal forall (T0 : ty) (t1 v2 : tm) (mu : list (nat * tm)) (Ty : ty) (St : store_ty),
  has_type [] St (App (Lam T0 t1) v2) Ty -> True.
Proof.
  intros T0 t1 v2 mu Ty St Hty.
  inversion Hty; subst.
  Show.
Abort.
EOF
coqc /tmp/test_abs.v 2>&1 | head -15

From Stdlib Require Import Arith List Lia.
Import ListNotations.
Inductive ty : Type := TyNat | TyBool | TyArrow : ty -> ty -> ty.
Inductive tm : Type :=
  Var : nat -> tm | Num : nat -> tm | Lam : ty -> tm -> tm | App : tm -> tm -> tm.
Fixpoint subst (j : nat) (s t : tm) : tm := t.
Fixpoint shift_at (d : nat) (t : tm) : tm := t.
Definition shift (t : tm) : tm := shift_at 0 t.
Definition store_ty := list ty.
Inductive has_type : list ty -> store_ty -> tm -> ty -> Prop :=
  | T_Var : forall G S x T, nth_error G x = Some T -> has_type G S (Var x) T
  | T_Lam : forall G S T1 T2 t, has_type (T1 :: G) S t T2 -> has_type G S (Lam T1 t) (TyArrow T1 T2)
  | T_App : forall G S t1 t2 T1 T2, has_type G S t1 (TyArrow T1 T2) -> has_type G S t2 T1 -> has_type G S (App t1 t2) T2.
Goal forall (T0 : ty) (t1 v2 : tm) (mu : list (nat * tm)) (Ty : ty) (St : store_ty),
  has_type [] St (App (Lam T0 t1) v2) Ty -> True.
Proof.
  intros T0 t1 v2 mu Ty St Hty.
  inversion Hty; subst. inversion H3; subst.
  Show.
Abort.
EOF
